summary: Software engineer with 2+ years of experience in developing scalable apps, automating tasks with pipelines and working with distributed systems. Proficient in building reliable and efficient systems and collaborating across engineering teams.

education.title: University of Waterloo
description: Awards: Presidents Scholarship of Distinction, Dean’s Honours List
Course-Work: Distributed Systems (Big Data), Machine Learning, Object-Oriented Programming

experience.title: Environics Analytics
description:
Developed a robust data pipeline using Python, SQL and Alteryx to streamline data product translations, resulting in ~$40K in savings per product translation.
Built a Python app to extract, filter and export from usage-databases featuring efficient processing of large tables;  streamlined data-analysis cross-functional teams.
Enhanced SQL databases to provide insights into API usage, increasing data accuracy and enabling better decision-making.

experience.title: Martinrea International
description:
Automated ETL processes to analyze data warehouses, achieving $10K+ annual savings and improving efficiency.
Built a distributed supply chain monitoring system with Apache Spark, tracking real-time inventory and ensuring uninterrupted material flow.
Co-lead a project to optimize the flow of materials across a manufacturing plant, increasing overall output and cost efficiency by 30%.

experience.title: Timeplay
description:
Designed and implemented scalable backend services with Go, enhancing API reliability for high-traffic systems.

Optimized NoSQL schemas and improved system clarity, resulting in a 20% reduction in query response times.

Deployed and maintained CI/CD pipelines, reducing deployment time for new features by 30%.

projects.title: Distributed Spam Email Classifier
description:
Built a distributed pipeline with Apache Spark and HDFS to train a spam classifier on large datasets (~1GB+).
Implemented stochastic gradient descent to optimize model training, improving processing efficiency.

projects.title: Automated Restaurant Reservation Business
description: Developed a distributed system in Go to automate restaurant reservations, generating ~$3K/month from subscriptions.
Deployed on distributed systems using Google Cloud Scheduler, an automated Task Manager for scalability and efficiency and cloud storage for saving data.

projects.title: Voice-to-Instrument
description: Developed a desktop app enabling real-time translation of human voice into various musical instruments.
Implement probabilistic algorithms with Python (Numpy, Pandas, PyTorch) for detection of pitch, tempo, etc.
Built a Python-based backend with a React GUI for seamless integration and user interaction.
